title: YOUTHLINE - 211info
text: LINES FOR LIFE YOUTHLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a crisis intervention line. Additionally provides support and referrals around such topics as dealing with bad test grades, running away from home, homelessness, a recent breakup, depression, anxiety, bullying, pregnancy, self-harm, or substance use disorders. 5100 SW Macadam Avenue Suite 400 Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Youth ages 10-24 and their families Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (877) 968-8491 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (877) 968-8491 Text Short Code 839863 Text the following: teen2teen Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, text, email, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: General Crisis Intervention Hotlines * Youth Issues Mental Health Crisis Lines * Youth Issues Runaway/Homeless Youth Helplines Youth Issues Information Services Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - CONSTRUCTION CARELINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - 988 SUICIDE AND CRISIS LIFELINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MILITARY HELPLINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - SENIOR LONELINESS LINE SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ALCOHOL AND DRUG HELPLINE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LINES FOR LIFE
